dialogos.texto_en: (Finally, the time for the answer has come.)
(They are all waiting for me in their respective places.\n Each one has told me where to find them.)
(All I have to do is confess to them, \n then the game will be over.)
(No matter what the result may be,\n it will mark a milestone in the relationship\n for the six of us.)
(The days of this graduation trip\n have really passed by so quickly.)
(But I am different from the night of the after-party.\n I've decided on my feelings,\n and am prepared to express them.)
(I wonder if I have the right to confess to them,\n being someone like me...\n But that's not for me to decide.)
(The fifth message.\n It seems like everyone\n has safely arrived at the meeting place.)
